view.title: Validate explicit UC need #1
view.subtitle: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for booking flexibility is satisfied as evidenced by the booking details.

blocks.title: Uc Need Validate 1 completed
blocks.message: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for booking flexibility is satisfied as evidenced by the booking details.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step successfully validates the requirement of booking an appointment 'any time Tuesday' or 'this week' through the linked use case. The evidence shows that a patient can book a floating appointment with a preference for 'Tuesday-Thursday' and the system assigns a specific time based on availability, confirming that the requirement is met. Specifically, the booking order evidence indicates that the appointment was confirmed for a time within the requested week, thus fulfilling the requirement.
